prestazioni: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade utilizing the S63B44T4 (4.4L V8 twin-turbo) engine with a Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285S-G twin-scroll turbocharger kit (62mm inducer, 85mm exducer, 1.28 A/R turbine housing) paired with a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe and GESI high-flow catted exhaust system, pushing 850whp on E85 with a Motec M150 ECU standalone conversion and Bosch Motorsport 1050cc injectors

Full Ohlins Road & Track coilover suspension system (part #BMW-01-RT) with 3-way adjustable damping, Swift Springs 12K/10K front/rear spring rates, and custom camber plates for -4.5° front and -3.8° rear alignment, paired with H&R 25mm front and 20mm rear anti-roll bars

Drexler Motorsport limited-slip differential (part #DREX-925001) with 85% lockup under power, upgraded 40-spline output shafts, and a custom 3.91:1 final drive ratio swap, paired with an MCS 4-way adjustable hydraulic bump stop kit and Pagid RSL29 380mm front/370mm rear brake rotors with Alcon 6-piston monoblock calipers
estetica: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (part #RB-BMW-X6M-03) with custom carbon fiber fenders, extended 50mm front and 70mm rear overfenders, and integrated canards, paired with a Vorsteiner V-FF 110 carbon fiber front lip and rear diffuser

Custom Akrapović Evolution Line Titanium exhaust system with quad 102mm carbon fiber tips, integrated into a custom rear bumper valance with CNC-machined billet aluminum exhaust outlets and a hidden tow hook delete panel

Full carbon fiber interior overhaul featuring a Status Racing carbon fiber steering wheel (part #SR-1000-CF) with integrated Motec C127 dash display, Recaro SPG XL carbon fiber bucket seats (part #20-968400-80) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage by VAC Motorsports (part #VAC-RC-BMW-X6M) with integrated fire suppression system
